sources.name: ISO New England Newswire
sources.purpose: Official news updates on New England power grid operations, transmission planning, and regional energy markets.

sources.name: PJM Board Public Disclosures
sources.purpose: Authoritative public board disclosures, stakeholder correspondence, and transmission project approvals from PJM.

sources.name: ANS Nuclear Newswire
sources.purpose: Comprehensive trade and technical updates on reactor engineering, nuclear research, and policy from the American Nuclear Society.

sources.name: NucNet
sources.purpose: Global nuclear industry news, international reactor developments, and policy reporting.

sources.name: Duke Energy Newsroom
sources.purpose: Corporate news releases, dividend announcements, grid improvements, and utility-scale solar and nuclear power updates from Duke Energy.

sources.name: Entergy Newsroom
sources.purpose: Reliability notices, regional generation news, and nuclear fleet operations updates from Entergy.

sources.name: NextEra Energy Newsroom
sources.purpose: Press releases and quarterly financial announcements from NextEra Energy, focusing on wind, solar, and nuclear power.

sources.name: GE Vernova Newsroom
sources.purpose: Press updates, investor relations, and technology announcements for GE Vernova across gas, wind, and nuclear reactor products.
